author: MoudBarthez
title: The Perfect Player “the Pro Version”
content:
This app does nearly everything you can dream of!
Can play even FLAC.
It can import Audio from nearly every major Cloud Service including, Google Drive, Dropbox, Mega, and of course the iCloud.

It can be used for music, and also it has “save playback position” and Speed controls for Audiobooks. Just Magnanimous.

The only setback is, and i hope the Developer add it soon, is an app for Apple watch.

Cause this app work perfectly not only on iPhone, but also on iPad, epically iPadOS, unlike other apps, it can run horizontally and vertically.
It also can run in the side load apps and split screen which is phenomenon.
